title: ilex maxima
intro: Ilex maxima, also known as the Large-leaf Holly or Chinese Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae, characterized by its large, leathery leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ilex maxima include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Ilex maxima is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and berries can be dried and used in herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules.
